overall.description: Game engine footage from a truck simulator showing first-person cabin view driving on a snow-covered highway during a heavy snowstorm. Windshield wipers operate continuously as the truck navigates through reduced visibility conditions, occasionally checking side mirrors and sharing the road with other vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered multi-lane highway with tree-lined shoulders

agents.ego_description: driving steadily through heavy snowfall on the highway, maintaining lane position with wipers active

notable_agents.action: truck traveling ahead in the same lane, visible through falling snow

entered.detail: dark interior dashboard with illuminated gauges and controls
large truck steering wheel with chrome accents
GPS screen mounted on dashboard displaying route map
wipers moving back and forth clearing heavy snow from windshield
multi-lane road covered in snow with visible lane markings
evergreen trees blanketed in snow lining the highway
metal highway guardrail partially buried in snow

segments.scene_description: The truck cruises steadily along a snow-covered highway with active windshield wipers. The interior dashboard and steering wheel frame the view of the snowy road ahead, while snow-laden evergreen trees line both sides of the highway. Visibility is significantly reduced due to the heavy snowfall.

scene_state.functional_zone: driver side window view of snowy highway shoulder

events.description: driver turns head and camera pans left to check side mirror and blind spot

agents.ego_description: checking left side mirror and blind spot while maintaining vehicle control

entered.detail: large rectangular side mirror with snow accumulation on the housing
driver side window showing snowy landscape passing by

segments.scene_description: The camera pans left as the driver checks the side mirror and blind spot. The side mirror and window frame a view of the snow-covered roadside and trees passing by, while the dashboard shifts to the right side of the frame.

events.description: truck overtakes a slower red semi-truck on the right side
passes under overhead highway sign gantry

agents.ego_description: continuing highway journey through heavy snow, overtaking slower vehicles and maintaining safe following distances

notable_agents.action: red semi-truck being overtaken on the right side of the highway
oncoming traffic visible through the snow in the opposite lanes

entered.detail: steering wheel returns to center view as camera faces forward
GPS screen visible again in center dashboard
large metal overhead structure spanning the highway with directional signs
highway signs indicating exits and directions

segments.scene_description: Returning to the forward-facing view, the truck continues navigating the snowstorm, overtaking a red semi-truck on the right. The vehicle passes under overhead sign gantries while the wipers maintain visibility through the heavy snowfall, with other traffic visible ahead and in opposing lanes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from within a truck cabin as the view shifts from the road ahead to a side-angle check of the snowy surroundings. It begins with the camera facing forward, where the dashboard and steering wheel frame a highway flanked by snow-laden evergreen trees under heavy snowfall. As the truck cruises steadily, the active windshield wipers continuously clear the glass to maintain limited visibility of the white road. The camera then pans smoothly to the left, shifting the dashboard to the right of the frame to focus on the side mirror and window. This movement reveals the blurred roadside and passing trees in the blind spot before the view settles on the wintry landscape rushing past the vehicle.

The shot follows a continuous forward-facing perspective as a truck navigates a dense, whiteout snowstorm along a busy highway. It begins with the camera centering on the road ahead, where windshield wipers work rhythmically to clear the heavy snowfall. As the vehicle maintains its speed, the camera tracks the process of overtaking a red semi-truck on the right side of the lane. The scene then shifts as the truck passes beneath a series of overhead sign gantries, while the surrounding traffic in both directions remains visible through the haze. Finally, the view stabilizes on the road ahead, continuing through the relentless storm and the blur of passing vehicles.
